data.name: ChangeLogRT
data.value: {\rtf1\ansi\ansicpg1252\deff0\nouicompat{\fonttbl{\f0\fnil\fcharset0 Segoe UI;}{\f1\fnil\fcharset134 SimSun;}{\f2\fnil\fcharset0 SimSun;}{\f3\fnil\fcharset1 Segoe UI Symbol;}{\f4\fnil\fcharset0 Segoe UI Symbol;}{\f5\fnil Segoe UI Symbol;}{\f6\fnil Segoe UI;}} {\colortbl ;\red0\green102\blue204;\red51\green153\blue102;} {\*\generator Riched20 10.0.26100}\viewkind4\uc1 \pard\cf1\b\f0\fs28\lang9 SkyeClip v1.3 What's New\par \cf0\fs24 Released April 2026\par \cf1\fs28\par \cf2\fs24 New Features\par \cf0\b0\f1\lang1033\'a3\'ab\f2 \f0 Added a new Rules system that reacts to your context. App Rules trigger actions when specific apps are active. Location Rules trigger actions based on your current network. Time Rules trigger actions based on the current time. Content Rules trigger actions based on clipboard content, keywords, or formats.\par \f1\'a3\'ab\f2 \f0 Added full Profile support, allowing you to maintain completely separate clipboard environments (Personal, Work, DEV, etc.). Each profile includes its own clipboard history, Favorites, theme, and behavior settings. Switching profiles updates the entire app instantly and safely. Clip Explorer now supports moving clips between profiles for easy organization.\cf2\b\lang9\par \par Improvements\par \cf0\b0\f3\u10003?\f4\lang1033 Changed "Export Clip" to "Save To File" to distinguish from the Import/Export function.\f5\lang9\par \f3\u10003?\f4\lang1033 Added Home Page link in About window.\par \par \cf2\b\f0\lang9 Fixes\par \cf0\b0\f3\u10005?\f4\lang1033 Fixed a rare issue where the Clip Viewer could fail to open until restarting the app. The viewer now initializes reliably on first use.\f5\lang9\par \f3\u10005?\f4\lang1033 \f0 Fixed an issue that prevented certain keystrokes in Scratch Pad. Keyboard now works normally.\f5\lang9\par \cf2\b\f0\par \cf1 SkyeClip v1.2\fs28\par \cf0\fs24 Released February 2026\par \cf1\fs28\par \cf2\fs24 New Features\par \cf0\b0\f1\lang1033\'a3\'ab\f0 Maintenance System Added. SkyeClip now includes an internal maintenance scheduler that runs quietly in the background. Automatic clip purging now occurs once per day while the app is running, ensuring long\f6\_term performance without requiring restarts. Automatic backups have been upgraded with flexible frequency options (daily, every other day, weekly, monthly, etc.) and now run reliably based on your selected schedule.\f1\par \'a3\'ab\f0 Backup System: Both manual and automatic backups of the database file are supported. Backup filenames include the application name and a date and time stamp for easy identification. Auto\f6\_\f0 backups use the same safe backup routine as manual backups and support automatic cleanup of older backup files.\par \f1\'a3\'ab\f0 Export Clip Support. SkyeClip now lets you export any stored clip to a file. Text clips save as TXT/RTF/HTML, images save as PNG/JPG/BMP, and FileDrop clips export as ZIP archives.\f1\par \'a3\'ab\f0 SkyeClip now lets you know when a new version is available. The About screen performs a quiet daily check and displays an upgrade notice right under the version number.\f1\par \'a3\'ab\f0 Added File Drop previews to Clip Explorer.\par \f1\'a3\'ab\f0 \f4 Clip Explorer now has image format previews.\f1\par \par \cf2\b\f0\lang9 Improvements\par \cf0\b0\f3\u10003?\f4\lang1033 \f5\lang9 Refined startup sequence to ensure timers and maintenance tasks initialize safely and predictably.\par \f3\u10003?\f4\lang1033 Scratch Pad now displays FIleDrops as a plain text file listing.\cf2\b\f0\lang9\par \cf0\b0\f3\u10003?\f4\lang1033 File size now includes folders in FileDrop previews.\f5\lang9\par \f3\u10003?\f4\lang1033 Unified clip previews under a single canonical function. Now both the current clipboard contents and the clip saved from that will share the same text.\f5\lang9\par \f3\u10003?\f4\lang1033 Enabled multi-row select in Clip Explorer. Updated context menu to work with multiple rows at a time.\f5\lang9\par \f3\u10003?\f4\lang1033 Added file count and size totals to FileDrop previews in both Clip Viewer and Clip Explorer.\f5\lang9\par \f3\u10003?\f4\lang1033 Added more Themes.\par \par \cf2\b\f0\lang9 Fixes\par \cf0\b0\f3\u10005?\f0\lang1033 Clips now show leading spaces in the tray menu.\f5\lang9\par \f3\u10005?\f0\lang1033 Fixed clip preview not showing in Tray tooltip during startup.\f5\lang9\par \f3\u10005?\f0\lang1033 Fixed a "No Columns Exist" error in Clip Explorer when closing the window.\f5\lang9\par \cf1\b\f0\fs28\par \fs24 SkyeClip v1.1\fs28\par \cf0\fs24 Released January 2026\par \par \cf2 New Features\par \cf0\b0\f1\lang1033\'a3\'ab\f2 \f0 New Theming System. SkyeClip now includes a unified Light/Dark theme engine that optionally stays in sync with Windows, updating instantly when your system theme changes.\f1\par \'a3\'ab\f0 Clip Explorer, your fast and lightweight window into everything you\rquote ve copied. It gives you a clean, organized view of your clipboard history with clear previews, helpful details, and quick actions. Clip Explorer makes it easy to find and reuse your content.\f1\par \'a3\'ab\f0 Added Auto-Start With Windows Feature in Settings.\f1\par \'a3\'ab\f0 Added Scratch Pad, a lightweight built\f6\_\f0 in editor for quick notes and temporary text. Supports rich text and plain text, import/export, full editing shortcuts, a dedicated context menu with Shift\f6\_\f0 modified actions and optional persistence via Keep Text.\f1\par \'a3\'ab\f0 Open Source App. Added a new action to the clip context menu that lets you reopen the application a clip originated from. Includes safe, path\f6\_\f0 based legitimacy filtering to avoid system or background processes.\par \f1\'a3\'ab\f0 Source App Metadata. SkyeClip now stores the originating app\f6\rquote\f0 s name, executable path, and icon for each new clip, enabling richer app\f6\_\f0 aware actions.\par \f1\'a3\'ab\f0 Clip Action Context Menu. Introduced a dedicated right\f6\_\f0 click menu for individual clips featuring Set Clip, Favorite / Unfavorite, View Clip, and Delete. This focused interaction avoids keeping the tray menu open and significantly improves mouse\f6\_\f0 driven workflows.\par \cf1\b\lang9\par \cf2 Improvements\par \cf0\b0\f3\u10003?\f4\lang1033 Added "<RTF>" or "<HTML>" the the clip previews, depending on the type.\f5\lang9\par \f3\u10003? \f4\lang1033 Migrated the HTML preview subsystem from IE to WebView2 for modern, accurate rendering\par \f3\lang9\u10003?\f4\lang1033 Enhanced stability and performance of the preview window\f5\lang9\par \cf2\b\f0\par Fixes\par \cf0\b0\f3\u10005? \f4\lang1033 Fixed issues with inconsistent moving of forms.\f5\lang9\par \f3\u10005? \f4\lang1033 Fixed a bug with WebView2 in Clip Viewer that was preventing a clean load.\f5\lang9\par \cf1\b\f0\fs28\par \fs24 SkyeClip v1.0\fs28\par \cf0\fs24 Released January 2026\cf1\par \b0\par \cf2\b New Features\par \cf0\b0\f1\lang1033\'a3\'ab\f0 Toast notifications for quick visual feedback\par \f1\'a3\'ab\f0 Notification tray icon with fast access to your history\f1\par \'a3\'ab\f0 Core clipboard history with Favorites and Viewer support\cf1\b\lang9\par \par \cf2 Improvements\par \cf0\b0\f3\u10003? Smarter filtering of incoming clipboard content\par \u10003? Favorites HotKey now keeps the menu open for smoother workflow\par \u10003? Viewer HotKey now works consistently in the Favorites menu\par \u10003? General performance and responsiveness improvements\par \cf2\b\f0\par Fixes\par \cf0\b0\f3\u10005? Resolved an issue where Windows Explorer produced duplicate text clips\par \u10005? Various stability fixes across clipboard capture and menu refres\f4\lang1033 h\cf2\b\f0\lang9\par \cf1\par \fs28 Thank you for using SkyeClip!\cf0\b0\fs24\par }

data.name: HelpRT
